docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARTSELL, JEFFERY L AS TO DEFENDANT NOT THE SAME OLD GRIND, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORA TION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
